legs.label: Gate
legs.description: Require Director approval before a load-bearing rule is removed.
legs.lead: Rulebook edits wait for the Director.
beats: Presents the deprecation as an approval gate.

legs.label: Deprecate
legs.description: Append a deprecate ruling and apply the approved rule edit.
legs.lead: The stale rule is retired with provenance.
beats: Removes only the approved rule text.
